command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import time, subprocess
cmd=['node','--import','./src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/resolve-ts.mjs','--experimental-strip-types','--test','src/tests/integration/worktree-session-parity-contract.test.ts','src/tests/integration/rebrand-surface-contract.test.ts']
t0=time.time()
proc=subprocess.run(cmd,cwd='.',stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,text=True)
dur=int((time.time()-t0)*1000)
print(proc.returncode)
print(dur)
PY
